title: Allergies & Adverse Reactions
description: Record your allergies and adverse reactions
descriptionDetail: Search for allergens using SNOMED CT — the international clinical terminology standard. These are included in your International Patient Summary (IPS) export as the Allergies and Adverse Reactions section.
privacy: Your allergies are stored locally on this device and only included in the IPS when you export it.
noAllergies: No allergies or adverse reactions recorded yet.

form.title: Add an Allergy or Adverse Reaction
form.searchHint: Type at least 2 characters to search SNOMED CT substances.
form.searchError: Could not reach the terminology server. Check your connection and try again.
form.noResults: No matching substances found. Try different search terms.
form.notesPlaceholder: Any additional details about this allergy...
